description_long: This perfume bottle features a sleek, modern design with a cylindrical lower body made of dark green translucent material and a matte black upper section that serves as the cap. The front of the bottle displays a bold, white 'SR.N' logo and additional text, giving it a contemporary, masculine appearance. The cap is tall, slightly curved at the top, and appears to be made of sturdy plastic, with a small circular spray nozzle at the center. The back of the bottle is smooth and unadorned, with a subtle indentation and a faintly visible actuator for the spray mechanism. The overall silhouette is symmetrical and streamlined, with a clear separation between the cap and the bottle body. The materials and finish suggest a product designed for durability and ease of use, suitable for carrying in a bag or placing on a bathroom shelf.
description: A modern, cylindrical perfume bottle with a dark green base and a tall, matte black cap featuring a prominent white logo and spray nozzle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white 'SR.N' logo, label text, and the spray nozzle centered on the matte black cap.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the bottle's cylindrical shape and the cap's smooth, slightly curved profile, with no visible text.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain, dark green bottle body and the back of the black cap, including a subtle actuator indentation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, highlighting the bottle's symmetry and the seamless transition between cap and body.
attribute_brand_logo: A bold, white 'SR.N' logo is printed on the front of the bottle, with a modern, sans-serif font and a diagonal line through the 'N'.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The cap is tall, cylindrical, and matte black with a slightly curved top. It appears to be made of hard plastic, is likely removable, and features a small, centered spray nozzle. The cap is smooth with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The bottle has a cylindrical silhouette with a straight, vertical profile and a rounded base. The cap is slightly taller than the bottle body and maintains the same diameter, creating a unified, symmetrical outline.
attribute_decorative_elements: The only decorative element is the bold, white printed logo and text on the front; there are no engravings, embossing, or additional embellishments.
